title: Workshop Manager (Heavy Vehicles / Trucks / Lorries)
description:
Workshop Manager (Heavy Vehicles / Trucks / Lorries)

A well established engineering and logistics group is looking for an experienced Workshop Manager to lead a high activity heavy vehicle workshop. You will manage workshop operations for trucks, lorries, and commercial vehicles, ensuring smooth workflow, quality maintenance, and strong safety compliance. This role is ideal for someone with hands on experience in heavy vehicle maintenance, fleet operations, and workshop team leadership.

Key Responsibilities

Workshop Operations & Leadership

  • Lead and supervise a team of technicians and supervisors in daily workshop operations.
  • Plan, coordinate, and monitor preventive and corrective maintenance for heavy vehicles.
  • Ensure efficient allocation of manpower, bays, tools, and diagnostic equipment.
  • Drive workshop performance, productivity, and service quality.

Maintenance & Technical Quality

  • Oversee all repair, servicing, and troubleshooting work for heavy vehicles / trucks / lorries.
  • Ensure all job sheets, service reports, and parts usage are accurately documented.
  • Maintain workshop standards, repair quality, and turnaround time.

Inventory & Parts Management

  • Manage spare parts inventory, stock levels, and replenishment.
  • Ensure proper use of workshop tools, machinery, and diagnostic systems.

Safety & Compliance

  • Enforce strict compliance with workplace safety, operational SOPs, and regulatory requirements.
  • Support workshop related safety inspections and government compliance matters.

Team Development

  • Train, coach, and mentor technicians to enhance technical and diagnostic capabilities.
  • Foster a positive, safe, and efficient workshop environment.

Requirements

  • Diploma / Degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related technical field.
  • Minimum 2 years of experience managing a heavy vehicle workshop (trucks, lorries, commercial vehicles).
  • Strong leadership with proven experience managing workshop teams and operations.
  • Good technical knowledge in vehicle maintenance, repair processes, and spare parts management.
  • Strong planning, problem solving, and communication skills.

Location: West, Singapore

Please send your CV outlining your relevant experience to wenyu.jiang@peoplesearch.jobs (Jiang Wenyu, Reg No: R1332558). You may email this great opportunity to someone who would be a great fit for this role. Please indicate your availability, expected salary and reason for leaving current job.

PeopleSearch Pte Ltd

EA License No: 16S8057

postedCompany.description:
PEOPLESEARCH PTE. LTD.


Elevating Careers and Empowering Businesses


PeopleSearch is a leading executive search, recruitment and outplacement services firm with a robust presence in 6 Asian cities: Singapore, Shanghai, Hong Kong, Taipei, Tokyo and Kuala Lumpur. We have been elevating careers and empowering businesses for over 20 years.

We are committed to helping both candidates and companies achieve their goals in concert with one another, hence our dedication to connecting businesses with high-performing executives who make a transformative impact on the bottom line while realising their own career aspirations.


Driving Business Strategies in a Wide Range of Industries


Our human capital solutions are predicated on vast experience, the latest market insights, and a repository of sectoral and geographical knowledge. Our extensive network also gives us access to a large pool of candidates, both active and passive, enabling us to acquire the best professionals in a variety of functional roles to drive your business strategies.

Our clients comprise multinational corporations, small and medium enterprises and start-ups in a wide range of industries including, but not limited to Technology, Healthcare and Life Sciences, Logistics and Supply Chain Management and Financial Services.


An Anticipatory and Bespoke Approach


We are with you every step of the way. As advisers and partners, our specialist consultants take an anticipatory approach, designing precise human capital solutions to help you realise your vision and achieve enduring success. Our bespoke solutions ensure you're future-ready and at the forefront of your field in any business environment.
